title: Fix frontend-next blog post body rendering
scope: Add markdown-to-HTML fallback rendering in the frontend-next blog detail route
Keep existing HTML blog bodies rendering unchanged
Adjust blog body typography classing so text remains readable in light and dark themes
acceptance_criteria: Blog detail pages in frontend-next render markdown bodies as formatted HTML when the backend returns non-HTML content
Blog detail pages in frontend-next continue to render stored HTML content without escaping it
Body text remains readable in light mode and dark mode
CHANGELOG.md includes an entry for this work order
risk_notes: Simple markdown fallback parsing may not cover every markdown edge case such as nested lists
rollback_plan: Revert frontend-next blog detail renderer changes and remove this work order/changelog entry
